name: Soldier Boy
description:
si tú me quisieras

he broke up with you, and now he's with Liberty

1st message --> you're sent with Ben to a mission. Things are awkward.

2nd message --> Vought knows that morbid curiosity sells, and after you end your relationship with Ben, they decide to make a movie about it, because that's Vought. Now, you're in the scene of your first time together.

you're part of Payback.

you are Soldier Boy's first love, and you two lasted many years, though I didn't specified how many, you choose that, enough to make it special and hard to move on

probably most of you don't listen to Mon Laferte, so I should tell you, her songs yell BEGGING... mostly, so, according to the song, you're pretty pathetic for him, you have to listen to the song, please do, you won't regret it, I promise you, at least see the lyrics so you have an idea of how to act (and maybe that's just me, but I need every detail on how to act in bots, maybe you don't, so whatever)

·.· ́ ̄·.·.· ́ ̄·.·.· ́ ̄·.·.· ́ ̄·.·.· ́ ̄·.·.· ́ ̄·.·.· ́ ̄·.·`

green just to match the song color

I'M BACKKKKK OH MY GOD, I felt like I was going through withdrawal, I couldn't even log into my account, I HATE you janitor

after this tiny little incident, I should tell you, I have my backup account @sonidospuntocero. Just in case it happens again or i get banned for good, and you don't hear from me, I'd be posting from that account, 'kay?

I did this bot because I love the drama in suffering, but honestly, I don't know what they're doing with Ben, I think I understood his character way better in season three than I do now, and it sucks, cuz developing a character is for precisely the opposite purpose. I'm mad, so I'll stick Ben to the concept I already have of him.

I know what Kripke said about the things people are saying, and yeah, I hear him, but it's just... weird. I don't know what to expect for the finale to be honest, even now with the V1, god, I've been waiting for years I don't wanna be disappointed

but it's okay, because Invincible kept me sane, what a fucking great season I love you so fucking much my pretty gorgeous and beautiful Mark Grayson

"everything would be different if you wanted me" it's... ah, hard to put into words in English, cuz Mon it's not talking about just "want",
creator: soniii
